page_content:
Formerly: EDPS703.

TLPL766 Impact Evaluation for Education and Public Policy (3 Credits) Students will learn about and practice using a variety of quantitative research methods that allow for causal inferences and can be applied to estimate the impact of policies or programs in education and other policy sectors.

Prerequisite: Knowledge of multivariate regression and prior experience with statistical programming software (e.g., Stata). TLPL765 or permission from instructor.

Credit Only Granted for. TLPL766, TLPL672, or EDPS621.
